rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Directing Court Cleark To Distribute Depositied Funds To Pay Creditors Judgment Against Renka Prop, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 5, 2022 line 1. THIRD PARTY RANDALL MORRISON'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING COURT CLERK TO DISTRIBUTE DEPOSITIED FUNDS TO PAY CREDITORS JUDGMENT AGAINST RENKA PROP, LLC is continued to January 19, 2022 to be heard with other pending motions per the order of the presiding judge. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: FILLMORE MANOR, LLC VS. TALIA KHAYET ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike, Or Alternatively, To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 5, 2022 line 2. PLAINTIFF FILLMORE MANOR, LLC'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE, OR ALTERNATIVELY, TO TAX COSTS is GRANTED. Defendant Amalia shall recover costs in the amount of $1,230. All other costs demanded in the Memorandum of Costs are stricken/taxed. The Court will consider both the Memorandum of Costs and the Motion to Tax Costs timely. While the Memorandum of Costs was timely submitted for filing, it was not in an acceptable format. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that Plaintiff has any obligation to respond to served but not properly filed papers. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. SALVADOR LOPEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 5, 2022 line 9. DEFENDANT SALVADOR LOPEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. On a demurrer, a feasible contract interpretation advanced by Plaintiff is accepted by the Court. Plaintiff served a 3 Day Notice in accordance with applicable law and Plaintiff's interpretation of paragraph 20 of the Lease. Complaint and notice state a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on nuisance, specifically construction and operation of a parklet without proper permits in violation of the Shared Spaced program that caused an issuance of a Corrective Notice. Whether Defendants had proper permits and operated in accordance with such permits and program rules is an issue of fact not properly addressed on a demurrer. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
